heading: Supported Clients
body:
You can run [$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch) queries by using the
Atlas UI, MongoDB Compass, [mongosh](mongodb-shell), and any [MongoDB
driver](drivers).

You can also use MongoDB Vector Search with local Atlas deployments that you
create with the Atlas CLI. To learn more, see [Create a
Local Atlas Deployment](atlas/cli/current/atlas-cli-deploy-local).

[$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch) is supported only on Atlas clusters
running the following MongoDB versions:

- v6.0.11

- v7.0.2 and later (including RCs (Release Candidates)).

You can run [$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch) queries by using MongoDB Compass,
[mongosh](mongodb-shell), and any [MongoDB driver](drivers).

You can run [$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch) queries by using MongoDB Compass,
[mongosh](mongodb-shell), and the following [MongoDB drivers](drivers):

| MongoDB Driver | Version         |
| -------------- | --------------- |
| Node           | 6.6.0 or higher |
| Python         | 4.7 or higher   |
